title: malaxis subtilis
intro: Malaxis subtilis, also known as the slender bog orchid, is a type of orchid native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis subtilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Malaxis subtilis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk remedies in various forms.
